vocab.example: I often go to the observation deck to take in the sprawling cityscape at night.

vocab.meaning: nằm ở trên cao (như chim đậu), tọa lạc ở vị trí cao
vocab.example: There's a quaint little pagoda perched on the hillside that offers a bird's-eye view of the valley.

vocab.meaning: hướng tầm nhìn ra (thường là từ một cửa sổ hoặc ban công)
vocab.example: My favorite library has large glass windows that look out onto a lush, botanical garden.

vocab.meaning: phô diễn, khoe ra (vẻ đẹp tự nhiên)
vocab.example: The riverside promenade really shows off the city's architectural blend of old and new.

vocab.meaning: nhô ra (khỏi một bề mặt hoặc đường bờ biển)
vocab.example: There are several rocky piers that jut out into the sea, providing a perfect spot to watch the sunrise.

vocab.meaning: trải dài băng qua (một khu vực rộng lớn)
vocab.example: From the lighthouse, you can see the white sandy beaches sweep across the entire coastline.

vocab.meaning: nằm gọn gàng, ẩn mình giữa (cây cối, đồi núi)
vocab.example: The ancient temples are nestled among the pine trees, creating a very picturesque and spiritual atmosphere.
The public benches are all positioned to face towards the lake so people can enjoy the reflection of the sunset.
The city skyline truly lights up after dark, turning the mundane concrete into a shimmering masterpiece.

vocab.meaning: nằm dựa lưng vào, có phía sau giáp với
vocab.example: My neighborhood backs onto a nature reserve, so we are treated to stunning forest views right from our backyards.
